original text:
LED R2-1 Speed Limit Sign | Dornbos Sign & Safety, Inc.
Official Flashing LED Speed Limit Signs are a great way to keep your roads safe!
Flashing R2-1 Speed Limit Signs are FHWA & MUTCD section 2A.07 Compliant.
See our description below for more information.
* Size: 18" x 24" 24" x 30" 30" x 36" 36" x 48"
